summary: NYC green taxi trip records from Microsoft Azure Open Datasets, including pickup/dropoff times, locations, passenger count, and payment type.
NYC for-hire vehicle (FHV) trip records from Azure Open Datasets, with dispatch base number, pickup/dropoff datetimes and location IDs.
US Bureau of Labor Statistics Current Employment Statistics (CES) nonfarm employment, hours, and earnings estimates at the national level.
US Bureau of Labor Statistics CES employment, hours, and earnings estimates at the state level by series ID and period.
US Consumer Price Index (CPI) data from BLS measuring average price changes for urban consumers by series, year, and period.
US Producer Price Index (PPI) by industry from BLS, tracking price changes at the producer level by series and period.
US Producer Price Index (PPI) by commodity from BLS, tracking commodity-level price changes by series and period.
US population by county from 2000 and 2010 Census, broken down by gender, race, and age group.
US population by ZIP code from the 2010 Census, segmented by gender, race, and age group.
Boston 311 service request data with daily updates, covering case types, status, department, and address.
Chicago 311 service request data with daily updates, covering service request type, status, street address, ward, and location.
NYC 311 service request data from 2010 to present, covering complaint types, agency, descriptor, location, and zip code.
San Francisco fire department calls and 311 cases from 2015 forward, including category, status, address, and coordinates.
Seattle fire department 911 dispatch records from 2010 forward, with incident type, address, datetime, and location coordinates.
MNIST handwritten digit image dataset with 70,000 labeled 28x28 pixel grayscale images for machine learning benchmarking.
Microsoft News (MIND) large-scale news recommendation benchmark dataset with user impression history and article interactions.
Worldwide public holidays for 38 countries from 1970 to 2099, with holiday names, country codes, dates, and paid time off status.
Large-scale Russian language speech-to-text dataset with audio files, transcriptions, and duration for STT model training.
